quote: The ambient predicate mean 'be cold (of weather)' is zero-place and indexes no participant. The experiential predicate merayke 'feel cold' is one-place; its affected experiencer carries the fourth-person S suffix =an, the same form an agentive fourth-person subject would carry.
issue: The Ainu word 'mean' is not italicized, while other Ainu words in the note are.
suggestion: The ambient predicate mean 'be cold (of weather)' is zero-place and indexes no participant. The experiential predicate merayke 'feel cold' is one-place; its affected experiencer carries the fourth-person S suffix =an, the same form an agentive fourth-person subject would carry.

quote: Surface rittursere is segmented as rir-tursere following Nakagawa's analysis of the incorporated wave element. Both patientive intransitives carry =an, not the object form i=.

suggestion: Surface rittursere is segmented as rir-tursere following Nakagawa's analysis of the incorporated wave element. Both patientive intransitives carry =an, not the object form i=.
